title: Hornet Removal in Murray Hill, Manhattan | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Murray Hill, Manhattan. Safe, effective treatment for $350-$550. Same-day service available. Call Best Pest Control NYC now!
intro: Murray Hill residents and businesses face unique hornet challenges due to the neighborhood's mix of pre-war buildings, townhouses, and modern high-rises. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert hornet removal services throughout Murray Hill, from Park Avenue to Third Avenue, ensuring safe and complete elimination of hornet nests. Our trained technicians understand the specific pest pressures in this historic Manhattan neighborhood and deliver fast, effective solutions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Murray Hill for years, with deep knowledge of the area's architectural styles and hornet behavior patterns. Our licensed exterminators provide same-day service, use eco-friendly treatments safe for families and pets, and offer guaranteed results with transparent pricing of $350-$550.
localContext: Murray Hill's tree-lined streets, rooftop terraces, and proximity to the East River create ideal conditions for hornet activity, especially during warmer months. The neighborhood's concentration of restaurants along Lexington and Third Avenues, combined with residential brownstones and co-op buildings, means hornets frequently build nests in building eaves, air conditioning units, and outdoor dining spaces.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Murray Hill?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day hornet removal service in Murray Hill, often arriving within 2-4 hours of your call. Our technicians are familiar with the neighborhood and can quickly access properties throughout the area, from Morgan Court to the Park Avenue corridor.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes complete inspection, safe nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, disposal of the nest, and a follow-up guarantee. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements for Murray Hill's multi-story buildings.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for Murray Hill apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for residential buildings, including apartments, co-ops, and condos common in Murray Hill. Our treatments are pet-friendly and safe for children, with no need for residents to evacuate during or after service.

faqs.question: When is hornet season in Murray Hill?
faqs.answer: Hornet activity in Murray Hill peaks from late spring through early fall (May-October), with the highest activity in July and August. However, we provide year-round hornet removal services, as nests can remain active during mild NYC winters, especially in sheltered building locations.
